commands.review_summary:
The PR tags provider-supplemental model catalog rows, adds a warn-only doctor check for explicit `agents.defaults.models` allowlists that hide those rows, updates focused tests, and adds changelog text.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main loads provider-supplemental catalog rows and allowlist gating can hide them, while doctor only checks the `hooks.gmail.model` case. I did not run a live doctor command because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Not a repair candidate: this review found no discrete code defect, but merge should wait for contributor real behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of the new doctor warning.

summary_lines: The branch restricts exact-head ClawSweeper proof markers to GitHub App-authored comments, adds read-only issue-comment token fallback for the proof workflow, and adds focused regression tests plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of current main shows any issue comment body with a matching `clawsw ...  SHA is accepted without author/App authentication; the PR adds focused negative tests for forged comments.
fixup_lines: PR branch already contained follow-up commit before automerge: fix(ci): authenticate proof verdict markers

target.title: feat(doctor): warn about hidden provider catalog models
target.body:
## Summary
- mark provider-supplied supplemental model catalog rows with stable catalog provenance
- add a warn-only doctor contribution for explicit agents.defaults.models allowlists hiding provider-supplied catalog models
- include opt-in guidance without changing the allowlist automatically

Fixes #39992.

## Testing
- pnpm test src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/agents/model-catalog.test.ts src/agents/model-selection.test.ts src/commands/models/list.list-command.forward-compat.test.ts extensions/openai/openai-provider.test.ts extensions/openai/openai-codex-provider.test.ts src/plugins/provider-runtime.test.ts
- pnpm test src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts
- pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/model-catalog.ts src/agents/model-catalog.types.ts src/agents/model-catalog.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts CHANGELOG.md
- pnpm check:changed
- git diff --check
target.author: sercada
